title: Turkish-Style Chicken in Papillote
description: A Japanese-inspired dish featuring tender chicken in a delicate papillote, wrapped in turkish-style spices.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt, black pepper, cumin, and coriander.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, honey, and rice vinegar.
Brush the mixture onto both sides of the chicken breast.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken breast for 2-3 minutes on each side, until browned.
Transfer the chicken to a papillote, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the papillote over the chicken, creating a tight seal.
Place the papillote on a baking sheet and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove the papillote from the oven and let rest for 2-3 minutes.
Serve the chicken in the papillote, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
